synopsis: "Death Masque" was an original comic story by Steve Moore that was published in The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 149. "Death Masque" was one of the few original stories published in the UK series. Unlike the other original stories, it was not reprinted in the Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds series. For over 30 years, it and the 1988 Ewoks Annual were among the only licensed Star Wars stories in any medium to never be officially released in the United States. It was finally collected in Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1 in 2013.
title: Death Masque
